input: How do I turn a SWOT analysis into concrete actions instead of just a list of observations?
We have a strong engineering team (strength) and AI is disrupting our market (opportunity). What SO strategies should we pursue?
How do I prioritize 20 possible strategic actions when we only have resources for 5?
Our biggest weakness is no brand recognition and our biggest threat is a well-funded competitor. What WT strategy should we use?
How do I track whether our SWOT-derived actions are actually working over time?
